77684312.title: West Indian cricket team in England in 2025
77684312.extract: The West Indies cricket team toured England in May and June 2025 to play the England cricket team. The tour consisted of three One Day International (ODI) and three Twenty20 International (T20I) matches. In August 2024, the England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB) confirmed the fixtures for the tour, as a part of the 2025 home international season. The series ran alongside the women's series between England and West Indies.

categories.title: Category:West Indian cricket tours of England
